corrections.note: Roman numeral in running head is XVIΙ, not mixed-script ΧVII.

corrections.current: καὶ δόξαν φωνῆς αὐτῶν ἤκουσεν τὸ οὖς αὐτῶν.
corrections.correct: καὶ δόξα φωνῆς αὐτῶν ἤκουσεν τὸ οὖς αὐτῶν.
corrections.note: Printed text has δόξα, not δόξαν.
Body reads singular αὐτοῦ; transcript imported plural from apparatus.
Body has singular αὐτοῦ; transcript has plural, likely influenced by apparatus.

corrections.current: καὶ πᾶσα ἁμαρτία αὐτῶν ἔναντι Κυρίου.
corrections.correct: καὶ πᾶσα ἁμαρτία αὐτῶν ἔναντι αὐτοῦ.
corrections.note: Printed body reads αὐτοῦ; Κυρίου is an apparatus variant.

corrections.current: + κ καυχασθαι εν τοις θαυμασιοις αυτου
corrections.correct: + ἵνα καυχᾶσθαι ἐν τοῖς θαυμασίοις αὐτοῦ
corrections.note: Printed apparatus includes ἵνα before καυχασθαι; transcript has stray κ.

notes: Left-margin parenthetical numbers and line numbers are correctly represented as line indicators, not verse text. Apparatus otherwise substantially matches, with normal loss of accents/breathings not reported except where letters/words are wrong.
